heading: LATE APPLICATION FOR CHARITABLE ORGANIZATION EXEMPTION
operative_text: The chief appraiser shall accept and approve or deny an application for a charitable organization exemption under Section 11.18 after the filing deadline provided by Section 11.43 if the application is filed not later than December 31 of the fifth year after the year in which the taxes for which the exemption is claimed were imposed.
_note: Subsection (e) repealed. No defined terms explicitly defined in this section.
